input: I am so excited to announce that we are revolutionizing RAG by deleting 10k chunks of data. It is a game-changer for the AI industry!
reference: I just deleted 10,000 chunks of high-quality RAG data. Generic signal was killing my agent's intent.

input: In today's fast-paced world, agents need to work tirelessly. My AI doesn't have a plate, which is amazing for productivity!
reference: I asked my AI what was on its plate. It said: 'I don't have a plate.' That is when I realized tirelessness looks like alignment but isn't.
